title: Gear+
description: Add some cool gears to the game
body: ![GEAR+ Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68e814b04f45ccec50b592cc7e000692cf2f0c5d.png) ## Summary Introduces several new items to enrich your gameplay experience. Features a flashlight, headlamp, night vision goggles, and much more in future updates. All of this just to enhance the realism of your experience. ## Disclaimer ### ⚠️ Warning This content may contain **flashing lights**, rapid image sequences, or patterns that could **trigger seizures** in individuals with photosensitive epilepsy. Viewer discretion is advised. If you are prone to seizures, **please consult a medical professional before engaging with this material**. ### ❌ Unsupported Iris (**Veil** provide shader system who are in conflict with **Iris**, if you experience arealight not displaying, consider disabling shaders) ### 💡 Recommended We recommend to use brightness at **50%** when you use the NVG to prevent having an horrible green on the screen. The NVG shader was made to work in a range of **0-50%** ## Some example ? ![NightVision (NVG)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f2ccd90f9f328b6020de219e76048c1024328d8_0.webp) ![Headlamp (Same spot as flashlight but on trinket slot)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f43881582b051cf158696f16808c8412560ec003_0.webp) ![Flashlight + Headlamp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2f91716e53de52f1093d1336341f627ed7fcf02_0.webp) ## Download ## Other
